full_description: TravelPal is a travel companion app that helps users plan and organize their trips. It provides a simple and intuitive way to manage itineraries, bookings, and expenses. With TravelPal, you can easily create and customize your trip itinerary, add bookings for flights, hotels, and activities, and track your expenses. The app also allows you to share your itinerary with friends and family, and receive real-time updates on flight schedules and travel alerts. Whether you're a frequent traveler or planning a one-time trip, TravelPal is the perfect tool to help you stay organized and make the most of your travel experience.
